import json
files = [
    'component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json',
    'component/adapters/adapters-doma-adaptor.json',
    'component/handlers/handlers-transaction-management-handler.json',
    'component/handlers/handlers-database-connection-management-handler.json',
]
for f in files:

    print(f'=== {f} ===')
    for s in data['sections']:
        print(f'  {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]}')
    print()
"
